title: Manage a seed bank
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage a seed bank demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan seed collection for a seed bank

pcs.text: Identify purpose and scope of seed bank
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify purpose and scope of seed bank?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify purpose and scope of seed bank.

pcs.text: Investigate and interpret seed characteristics for method of collecting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and interpret seed characteristics for method of collecting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and interpret seed characteristics for method of collecting.

pcs.text: Identify opportunities for seed collection from field observation and liaison with stakeholders in this field
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify opportunities for seed collection from field observation and liaison with stakeholders in this field?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify opportunities for seed collection from field observation and liaison with stakeholders in this field.

pcs.text: Identify site, site conditions and plants for seed collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site, site conditions and plants for seed collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site, site conditions and plants for seed collection.

pcs.text: Identify site specific hazards, assess risk and develop control procedures according to workplace health and safety policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site specific hazards, assess risk and develop control procedures according to workplace health and safety policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site specific hazards, assess risk and develop control procedures according to workplace health and safety policies.

pcs.text: Identify governing authority for site and contact stakeholder
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify governing authority for site and contact stakeholder?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify governing authority for site and contact stakeholder.

pcs.text: Obtain permits and approvals required for seed collection site according to regulations and tenure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain permits and approvals required for seed collection site according to regulations and tenure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain permits and approvals required for seed collection site according to regulations and tenure.

pcs.text: Select method of seed collection according to seed type and site conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select method of seed collection according to seed type and site conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select method of seed collection according to seed type and site conditions.

pcs.text: Determine and document quantity of seed to be collected from each provenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and document quantity of seed to be collected from each provenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and document quantity of seed to be collected from each provenance.
